ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: By those [winds] sent forth in gusts
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: By those ˹winds˺ sent forth successively,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And the winds that blow violently
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and those blowing violently,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And [by] the winds that spread [clouds]
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and those scattering ˹rainclouds˺ widely!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And those [angels] who bring criterion
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And ˹by˺ those ˹angels˺ fully distinguishing ˹truth from falsehood˺,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And those [angels] who deliver a message
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and those delivering revelation,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: As justification or warning,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ending excuses and giving warnings.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, what you are promised is to occur.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Surely, what you are promised will come to pass.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: So when the stars are obliterated
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So when the stars are put out,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when the heaven is opened
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and the sky is torn apart,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when the mountains are blown away
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and the mountains are blown away,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when the messengers' time has come...
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and the messengers’ time ˹to testify˺ comes up—

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: For what Day was it postponed?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: for which Day has all this been set?

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: For the Day of Judgement.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: For the Day of ˹Final˺ Decision!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And what can make you know what is the Day of Judgement?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And what will make you realize what the Day of Decision is?

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Woe on that Day to the deniers!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Did We not destroy the former peoples?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Did We not destroy earlier disbelievers?

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Then We will follow them with the later ones.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And We will make the later disbelievers follow them.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Thus do We deal with the criminals.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: This is how We deal with the wicked.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Woe on that Day to the deniers!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Did We not create you from a liquid disdained?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Did We not create you from a humble fluid,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We placed it in a firm lodging
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: placing it in a secure place

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: For a known extent.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: until an appointed time?

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We determined [it], and excellent [are We] to determine.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We ˹perfectly˺ ordained ˹its development˺. How excellent are We in doing so!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Woe on that Day to the deniers!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Have We not made the earth a container
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Have We not made the earth a lodging

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Of the living and the dead?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: for the living and the dead,

ayahs.textArabic: وَجَعَلۡنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِيَ شَٰمِخَٰتٖ وَأَسۡقَيۡنَٰكُم مَّآءٗ فُرَاتٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: WajaAAalna feeha rawasiya shamikhatin waasqaynakum maan furatan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We placed therein lofty, firmly set mountains and have given you to drink sweet water.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and placed upon it towering, firm mountains, and given you fresh water to drink?

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Woe on that Day to the deniers!

ayahs.textArabic: ٱنطَلِقُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Intaliqoo ila ma kuntum bihi tukaththiboona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [They will be told], "Proceed to that which you used to deny.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹The disbelievers will be told,˺ “Proceed into that ˹Fire˺ which you used to deny!

ayahs.textArabic: ٱنطَلِقُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ ظِلّٖ ذِي ثَلَٰثِ شُعَبٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Intaliqoo ila thillin thee thalathi shuAAabin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Proceed to a shadow [of smoke] having three columns
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Proceed into the shade ˹of smoke˺ which rises in three columns,

ayahs.textArabic: لَّا ظَلِيلٖ وَلَا يُغۡنِي مِنَ ٱللَّهَبِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: La thaleelin wala yughnee mina allahabi
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [But having] no cool shade and availing not against the flame."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: providing neither coolness nor shelter from the flames.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, it throws sparks [as huge] as a fortress,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, it hurls sparks ˹as big˺ as huge castles,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: As if they were yellowish [black] camels.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and ˹as dark˺ as black camels.”

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Woe on that Day to the deniers!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: This is a Day they will not speak,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: On that Day they will not ˹be in a position to˺ speak,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Nor will it be permitted for them to make an excuse.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: nor will they be permitted to offer excuses.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Woe on that Day to the deniers!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: This is the Day of Judgement; We will have assembled you and the former peoples.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹They will be told by Allah,˺ “This is the Day of ˹Final˺ Decision: We have gathered you along with earlier disbelievers ˹for punishment˺.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: So if you have a plan, then plan against Me.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So if you have a scheme ˹to save yourselves˺, then use it against Me.”

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Woe on that Day to the deniers!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, the righteous will be among shades and springs
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, the righteous will be amid ˹cool˺ shade and springs

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And fruits from whatever they desire,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and any fruit they desire.

ayahs.textArabic: كُلُواْ وَٱشۡرَبُواْ هَنِيٓـَٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Kuloo waishraboo haneean bima kuntum taAAmaloona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [Being told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹They will be told,˺ “Eat and drink happily for what you used to do.”

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Surely this is how We reward the good-doers.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹But˺ woe on that Day to the deniers!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [O disbelievers], eat and enjoy yourselves a little; indeed, you are criminals.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: “Eat and enjoy yourselves for a little while, ˹for˺ you are truly wicked.”

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Woe on that Day to the deniers!

ayahs.textArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱرۡكَعُواْ لَا يَرۡكَعُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waitha qeela lahumu irkaAAoo la yarkaAAoona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when it is said to them, "Bow [in prayer]," they do not bow.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: When it is said to them, “Bow down ˹before Allah,” they do not bow.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Woe on that Day to the deniers!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Then in what statement after the Qur'an will they believe?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So what message after this ˹Quran˺ would they believe in?
